title: Interludes — Permanent Rewards
routingNotes: Interludes are permanent reward zones — every reward is missable, do all three before maps.
Layouts persist between runs — once you know an interlude, alts can speedrun the rewards.
Total weapon-swap skill point target by end of interludes: ~24 points.
Orbala's 7 Boons (Khari Bazaar) can be swapped anytime by returning to the pillar.
Mount Kriar layouts and POIs are consistent — Elder Maddox always 10-11 o'clock, Doryani's Contingency far right.
0.5: monster density reduced specifically in Interludes — push, don't over-craft.
speedrunTips: Don't over-craft in Interludes. Next gear bracket is T1 maps — save exalts for endgame.
Confirm Ascendancy is finalized before +2 SP completion turn-in.
0.5: Apex is now Arbiter of Divinity, not Arbiter of Ash.

steps.text: Travel to Holten (docks town) — talk to The Hooded One
Visit Soul of the Ferryman (docks)
Progress through Wolvenhold after Holten
Slay Oswin, the Dread Warden
Complete interlude 5.1, return to town for next interlude
Travel to Khari Crossing via Hooded One
Slay Akthi & Anundr (Worm + Scorpion) — talk to Risu after
Torbek (Khari Crossing) — discount rare caster weapons
Enter Skullmaw Stairway via Khari Crossing
Activate Molten One's Gift — find seals, reset instance if bugged
Travel to Qimah
Use Orbala's Pillar — pick 1 of 7 Boons (swap anytime)
Qimah Reservoir Sacred Wells
Enter Sel Khari Sanctuary
Place Baryas of Rageen & Yoon on pedestals
Complete interlude 5.2, return to town

zones.name: Interlude 5.3 — Mount Kriar, The Glade
zones.newIn05: Second beacon set (Fate of the Vaal) is scattered across the Interludes. Opens portal to advance the storyline.

steps.text: Travel to Mount Kriar via Hooded One
Enter Ashen Forest
Find Ancient Monument in Ashen Forest
Travel to Kriar Village
Slay Lythara, the Wayward Spear
steps.reward: +40 Spirit, Spirit Gem Lv14 + Gemcrust Skull

steps.text: Travel to Glacial Tarn → enter Howling Caves
Slay The Abominable Yeti (drops Icy Tusks)
Travel to Kriar Peaks
Find Elder Maddox (10-11 o'clock position)
Travel far right to Doryani's Contingency
Find & energise the second set of 6 Ancient Beacons (scattered across Interludes) → Energised Crystals
Open portal to advance the Fate of the Vaal storyline
Talk to The Hooded One after all 3 interludes
Endgame Atlas / Maps unlock at Lvl 58-60
